name: Apfelpfannkuchen (Apple Pancakes)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the flour, 2 teaspoons sugar, and salt.
2. Mix together the eggs and milk. Gradually add the flour mixture, beating until smooth.
3. Cook the apple slices in a quarter cup of butter until tender. Mix the remaining 2 tablespoons sugar and cinnamon; toss with the apples.
4. Melt 2 tablespoons butter in a six-inch diameter deep frypan. Pour in the batter to a depth of about one-quarter inch.
5. When set, place a portion of the apples on top; cover with more batter. Fry the pancake until lightly browned on both sides. Keep warm.
6. Repeat the process three times, using all the batter and apples. Serve immediately.
